message:
feat(analytics): add PricingTable in-memory cache and per-record cost estimation

Introduce a PricingTable struct that loads model pricing data from the
model_pricing SQLite table into an in-memory cache for fast lookups during
analytics rollup computation. This enables accurate cost attribution for
token usage across different models and providers.

Key additions:
- PricingEntry struct for individual pricing rows with per-model/provider
  input/output/cache token costs and effective date tracking
- PricingTable::load() to bulk-load from SQLite with proper error handling
- PricingTable::lookup() with effective-date-aware matching (latest row
  at or before the target day_id wins)
- PricingDiagnostics for tracking pricing coverage: counts priced vs
  unpriced records and collects top unknown model names for observability
- TokenStatsAggregator::record_turn() now accepts estimated_cost_usd to
  accumulate per-day cost alongside token counts
- Enables downstream analytics dashboard features (bead z9fse.10)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
